national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Gold Refinery of San Diego
buyers.address: 5859 Mission Gorge Road, San Diego, CA 92120
buyers.payout_claims: Pays "up to 99% of the market price"; "We will beat any verifiable offer"
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says they test and weigh your gold right in front of you; also advertises an x-ray assay service on a dedicated page.
buyers.evidence_notes: Site states operating since 2008 ("over 18 years as the city's most trusted gold refinery"), lists CA State License Number 3711-1905, displays JBT Listed Gold Jewelry Buyer badge, and employs a full-time in-house GIA Graduate Gemologist.

buyers.name: Precious Metals Refinery (PMR) — La Jolla
buyers.address: 4445 Eastgate Mall, Suite 200, San Diego, CA 92121
buyers.payout_claims: "We will beat ANY written offer in San Diego!"
buyers.testing_transparency: Site describes a Thermo Fisher x-ray assay analyzer giving "a precise reading of purity and metal content — no damage, no guesswork."
buyers.evidence_notes: Location page says "PMR invites you into our private buying offices, ensuring you're never separated from your valuables." Displays BBB review badge, GIA-trained staff, and Jewelers of America membership. Multi-city chain with a real San Diego (La Jolla/UTC) office.

buyers.name: Leo Hamel Fine Jewelers & Jewelry Buyers
buyers.address: 1851 San Diego Ave #130, San Diego, CA 92110 (buying offices also in La Mesa, Oceanside, Solana Beach)
buyers.payout_claims: "We offer some of the highest payouts"; "competitive payout based on current gold prices" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says their experts quickly determine purity and value; specific testing method not described.
buyers.evidence_notes: Multi-location San Diego jeweler with dedicated gold-buying offices; contact page confirms four buying locations with addresses and hours. Sell-gold page: "Every offer is based on the current market price of gold."

buyers.name: Coin Mart
buyers.payout_claims: "Get a fair, expert evaluation and a same-day offer, no pressure" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site; emphasizes "Honest Evaluations" done same-day.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family jewelry store, gold and coin buyer established 1959 ("65+ years"). Owner quote on site: "We don't have to be the most expensive store in town. We just have to be the most trusted." Walk-ins welcome. Legacy gold subpage 404s; data from live homepage.

buyers.name: San Diego Coin & Bullion
buyers.address: 7420 Clairemont Mesa Blvd., #113, San Diego, CA 92111
buyers.payout_claims: "Competitive prices" and "fair buy prices" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Coin and bullion dealer describing itself as "one of Southern California's leading precious metals firms" with "transparent pricing and expert guidance." Buys collector coins, numismatic rarities, and gold/silver bullion.

buyers.name: San Diego Jewelry Buyers
buyers.hours: Weekdays until 6pm, Saturday until 5pm (opening times not stated)
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Footer lists "License # 37110819" plus BBB, JVC, and GIA affiliations; buys gold, diamonds, watches, and luxury goods from Gaslamp Quarter offices. Site copy appears dated (copyright 2008–2013), so details should be re-checked.

buyers.name: CV Coins & Collectables
buyers.address: 397 3rd Ave, Suite D, Chula Vista, CA 91910
buyers.hours: Appointments encouraged; walk-ins preferred before 11am or after 2pm (full posted hours not found)
buyers.payout_claims: "Pay top dollar" for gold, silver, and platinum — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Coin shop claiming "Over 50 Years in Business" serving Chula Vista/South Bay; offers buying, selling, appraisals, and grading; displays BBB badges and accepts cryptocurrency payments.

buyers.name: San Diego Coin Buyers
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Downtown coin and bullion dealer "now surpassing 15 years in business," located near Petco Park/Gaslamp; provides professional coin appraisals for estates, legal cases, and tax reporting. Upstairs suite, appointment-only.

buyers.name: Cal Coin and Jewelry
buyers.address: 9019 Park Plaza Dr Ste E, La Mesa, CA 91942
buyers.payout_claims: "We will get you the best price on your unused or broken jewelry items"; separate page says they will match or beat any verified dealer's offer
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site; offers free evaluations with payment on the spot.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned buyer of coins, bullion, gold/silver jewelry, and watches; site states "Established 2021 | Industry Experience Since 2006." Notes they buy silver when "other buyers are not interested."
